iterations.insight: Formally retires the alt-complex-bear regime axis (last iter-006 feature hypothesis). Arc iter-001..007: DD is ~92% alpha-residual (side mean-rev = zero-edge fat-left-tail), the big loss is essentially ONE correlated-alt-bear episode per universe, and NO free observable (price/funding/implied-vol/alt-direction) leads it consistently across episodes (per-cycle IC predictability R^2~0.005). Construction/feature/regime DD-fix family exhausted on free data. Remaining: bull-only beta strategy (different risk profile), fundamentally different alpha, paid leading data, or accept DD + kill-switch.

iterations.hypothesis: Reactive equity-drawdown stop (mechanical, PIT, NO forecast): de-gross held book to g_floor=0.40 when own cumulative equity >= X bps below running peak (through t-1); re-enter on 50%-heal OR 90-bar timeout. Recommended X=1600. Cap the HL70 tail for live capital preservation at a bounded, robust cost.

metrics.placebo_percentile: R4-PLACEBO matched-%-time (200 seeds): HL70 X=1600 p91, X=2000 p76; EXT X=1600 p52, X=2000 p42 -- all < p95 (proportional, NOT skill)

gate_results.R4: MIXED / skill-claim FAIL (HL70 stop beats const +150..+582 bps maxDD at X=1200-2500; EXT const matches/beats; R4-PLACEBO real ranks HL70 p91 / EXT p42-p52 < p95 -> tail-cap ~proportional to exposure removed, not skill-selective -- expected reactive-track outcome)
gate_results.R5: PASS-DECISIVE (X=1600 caps 3/4 EXT episodes: luna 60%, ftx 46%, 2024_summer 62%, 2025_q4 EXT-slice -0% shallow; episode-LOFO X=2000 ddRed +27.4/+30.1/+28.1/+30.1% dropping luna/ftx/2024/q4 -- does NOT vanish dropping any episode; first DD mechanism in the run to survive LOFO)

gate_results.R7: PASS (15 firings/15 re-entries, heal-or-timeout, eq>trough guard no buy-at-trough, g_floor>0 avoids frozen-equity permanent kill)

iterations.deployment_recommendation: DEPLOY the equity-stop form (X=1600, g_floor=0.40) as an OPTIONAL risk overlay -- real behavioral advantage over constant-de-gross (full exposure in calm, auto-protect in deep DD) at ~15 whipsaw RT/402d. Simpler near-equivalent: constant ~0.67 gross (no state machine, no whipsaw). ALPHA CHAMPION UNCHANGED (= baseline, Calmar +1.68). Propose 'Risk overlay (optional)' section in current_best.md.
iterations.insight: First DEPLOYABLE result of the run and the first DD mechanism to survive episode-LOFO -- because it REACTS rather than predicts. Reaction axis now characterized like the prediction axis (iters 5-10): the -57% DD is mechanically reducible at ~PROPORTIONAL cost (reactive stop, robust across episodes), but NOT reducible for free. No skillful tail-selector on free data (R4-PLACEBO p91 < p95; honest equivalent is constant ~0.67 gross). R6 EXT-FAIL shows the specific threshold is HL70-specific. Deliverable = the DD-vs-cost trade-off curve + X=1600 recommendation for the human to pick a risk point. Remaining classes out-of-scope for free-data construction (bull-only beta, different alpha, paid leading data, or accept DD + this stop).

iterations.hypothesis: PORTABLE vol-normalized equity-DD stop: de-gross held book to g_floor=0.40 when (peak-eq) >= k*sigma(trailing-180 equity increments)*sqrt(180), unitless k=2.0; heal-50%/90-bar re-entry. Replaces iter-011 absolute-X bps trigger to gain cross-universe portability.

metrics.placebo_percentile: R4-PLACEBO matched-%-time (200 seeds) @k=2.0: HL70 p70, EXT p55, S44 p70 -- all < p95 (tail-cap ~proportional to exposure removed, NOT skill -- expected reactive-track outcome)

gate_results.R1: PASS (Review PASS; PIT vol trigger -- dd/sigma/peak through t-1, incr[t] written AFTER gross fixed + pnl realized, HOLD-lagged sleeve book, warmup-60 firing guard, k chosen only in R6 from past folds; no forward peek). Base reproduces X117 EXACT (+1.93/-5674/Calmar1.68/+10472).
gate_results.R3: PASS-stated (totPnL cost HL70 -19.9% / EXT -32.4% / S44 -11.1%; Calmar IMPROVES all three 1.68->2.01, 0.66->0.74, 2.10->2.36; cost-robust {1,3,4.5}bps). k-sweep dial: lower k more DD cut + more firing, deeper k shallower.
gate_results.R4: ~PROPORTIONAL / skill-claim FAIL-expected (R4-PLACEBO matched-%-time 200 seeds @k=2.0: real ranks HL70 p70 / EXT p55 / S44 p70 < p95; STOP-CONST maxDD mixed +131/-393/+100. Tail-cap ~proportional to exposure removed, NOT skill-selective -- the expected reactive-track outcome, NOT a disqualifier on this track)
gate_results.R5: PASS-DECISIVE (volnorm k=2.0 caps 4/4 EXT episodes >=10%: luna 60.0%, ftx 56.5%, 2024_summer 55.9%, 2025_q4 10.8% -- beats absolute/pctile which miss shallow q4; episode-LOFO k=2.0 ddRed +37.5/+39.4/+37.7/+39.4% dropping luna/ftx/2024/q4 -- does NOT vanish dropping any one)
gate_results.R6: PASS 3/3 -- PORTABLE (THE HEADLINE; nested-OOS k chosen on PAST folds, applied FORWARD, PER UNIVERSE: HL70 +33.4% ddRed/-36.2% cost, EXT +29.1%/+27.7%, S44 +9.0%/+6.2% -- all PASS ddRed>+5% AND cost<40%; selector lands on low-k 1.5-2.0 every universe/fold. vs iter-011 absolute-X = 1/3, HL70-only, EXT FAILED -7.3%/+44.8%)
gate_results.R7: PASS (HL70 k=2.0: 15 round-trips, 14 re-entries, 51.4% time stopped; g_floor=0.40>0 no frozen-equity kill; eq>trough guard no buy-at-trough; heal-50%-or-90-bar timeout, no buy-back-at-top pathology)

iterations.deployment_recommendation: SUPERSEDE the iter-011 absolute-X=1600 risk overlay with this PORTABLE vol-normalized k=2.0 form in current_best.md. Same ~proportional tail-cap + Calmar improvement but PORTABLE across HL70/EXT/S44 under nested-OOS (R6 3/3 vs 1/3) and self-recalibrating to each universe's equity scale -- strictly more robust for a drifting-universe live deployment. ALPHA CHAMPION UNCHANGED (= baseline, Calmar +1.68). HONEST caveats: NOT free DD reduction, NOT skill (R4 p55-p70 < p95; honest equivalent constant ~0.67 gross). The stop's value = asymmetry of WHEN it de-risks + (new) self-normalizing portability. Human picks risk point via k dial.
iterations.insight: iter-012 closes the PORTABILITY gap of the reactive overlay that iter-011 left open (absolute X was HL70-tuned, R6 EXT-FAIL). The unitless k=2.0 ('sigmas of equity') means the same thing on every universe so it transports under nested-OOS (3/3). Reaction axis now fully characterized like the prediction axis (iters 5-10): the -33/-39% tail is mechanically reducible at ~PROPORTIONAL cost with a one-knob, PIT, portable, episode-LOFO-robust stop -- but NOT for free and NOT via skill. Both axes closed on free data. Remaining DD-reduction classes are out-of-scope (bull-only beta, different alpha, paid leading data) or 'accept DD + deploy this portable stop'. This is the recommended deployable reactive overlay for the live drifting-universe book.

iterations.hypothesis: Transaction-cost-aware no-trade band on held-book net weights: execute weight change only if |target-held|>=delta. Cost-efficiency layer; alpha champion unchanged. SOTA-grounded (Baldi-Lanfranchi FoFI 2024; arXiv:2412.11575).

gate_results.G1_lookahead: PASS (Review; gross identical across cost levels confirms clean pre-cost path)
gate_results.G3_nested_OOS_DECISIVE: FAIL — HL70 fwd Calmar +0.84->+1.08 lift +0.24 (5/6 folds) but EXT +0.65->+0.61 lift -0.03 (1/7 folds); selector leans into delta=0.05 trap (2/6 HL70, 3/7 EXT). Does NOT transport.
gate_results.G4_matched_random_skip_placebo: FAIL — HL70 p64/p36 (delta 0.02/0.03), EXT p26/p40; all < p95 (200 seeds)
gate_results.G5_per_fold: FAIL/moot — delta=0.02 HL70 5/7, EXT 5/8, S44 3/8; OOS lift evaporates
gate_results.G6_paired_CI: FAIL — HL70 delta=0.02 mean +0.080 bps/cyc CI [-0.002,+0.191] crosses 0; EXT crosses 0; S44 delta=0.03 clears 0 but NEGATIVE -0.165 (band hurts S44)
gate_results.G7_universe: FAIL — improvement does not hold across HL70+EXT+S44
gate_results.G8_cost: cost-only saving holds at 1/3/4.5bps but tiny; delta=0.05 gain is identical gross at every cost = bet change not cost saving

iterations.gross_pnl_cost_only_analysis: delta<=0.02 gross flat (+12272->+12441) = genuine cost-only saving (~+191 bps/402d). delta=0.05 gross JUMPS +12272->+13605 (+10.9%) with turnover collapse 800->491 = bet-changing trap (holds stale rank-boundary book). Gross identical across 1/3/4.5 bps confirms +13605 is a pre-cost path change, not a cost saving. Non-reproduced on EXT/S44 (Calmar +0.66->+0.78, +2.10->+2.35).
iterations.insight: Off-the-shelf SOTA cost-aware no-trade band gives NO robust edge — structurally: the rank-boundary churn it suppresses carries ~no signal (iter-016), so removing it is statistically indistinguishable from cutting random equal turnover (G4 p26-p64). The 6-sleeve held-book already amortizes turnover -> no cost-for-no-signal pocket to recover. Execution/cost-efficiency levers are EXHAUSTED on this book. Rule for future cost tricks: check GROSS PnL first — if gross moves, it is a bet change in disguise and must clear nested-OOS + multi-universe transport (this did not). Redirect to risk-side or new-signal work.

iterations.hypothesis: Short-horizon cross-sectional REVERSAL / cross-crypto lead-lag (seesaw): in sideways regime, re-rank held book by equal-weight ensemble score=z_xs(pred)-z_xs(rel_ret_1d) instead of pred. rel_ret_1d=return_1d-per-cycle XS mean (PIT). Signal PASSED universe-transport IC pre-check (HL70 -0.0360 t-9.76 / EXT -0.0302 t-12.33, same sign both, era-stable, orthogonal to pred corr -0.022, ~8.5x pred IC). Citations: Jia/Wu/Yan/Yin 2023 SSRN 3465924; Guo/Sang/Tu/Wang 2024 JEDC 104863; Hou 2007 RFS.

gate_results.G1_lookahead: PASS (Review; PIT verified: rel_ret_1d window [t-288,t] vs forward [t,t+48] share only close[t] known at t; IC -0.036 reproduced << +0.10 leak flag; re-rank LOSES gross = opposite of leak signature)
gate_results.G4_matched_placebo: FAIL p0 - within-cycle rel-shuffle 200 seeds: real ens ranks p0 (WORSE than random re-rank). HL70 real Calmar +0.49 vs placebo p50 +2.27 / p95 +3.65; EXT real +0.08 vs p50 +0.52 / p95 +0.70
gate_results.G5_per_fold: FAIL - ens>base HL70 2/7, EXT 1/8, S44 3/8; fold-LOFO lift stays NEGATIVE dropping each fold (broad loss, not 1-2-fold)
gate_results.G6_paired_CI: FAIL - HL70 obs diff -2.150 bps/cyc CI [-6.407,+1.871] crosses 0; EXT -1.173 CI [-2.379,-0.220] clears 0 NEGATIVE (hurts); no positive CI on any universe
gate_results.G7_universe_PnL_transport: FAIL - fails HL70; EXT per-episode ens>base only 1/4; 2025_q4 INVERTS best base episode (+4834/Sh+4.83 -> -3123/Sh-3.17). IC transports across universes, PnL does not
gate_results.G8_cost: FAIL (no edge to begin with) - GROSS PnL collapses -41/-54/-57% pre-cost => loss NOT a cost artifact; turnover up only +7.8/+19.5/+12.9%; loses even at 1bp (HL70 net +6810 vs base +11872)

iterations.gross_pnl_analysis: GROSS PnL falls on every universe with the ensemble: HL70 +12272->+7241 (-41%), EXT +20656->+9604 (-54%), S44 +29875->+12913 (-57%). The -z(rel_ret_1d) re-rank destroys pre-cost return - it does not raise it. Verified independently from per-cycle parquets via cost-slope (net@1bp vs net@4.5bp -> gross at cost=0); Sharpe/Calmar match handoff to the digit; base reproduces X117 exactly.
iterations.decisive_gates: GROSS-PnL collapse (-41 to -57% pre-cost) + G4 p0 (signal-aligned re-rank WORSE than random shuffle) + G7 EXT per-episode PnL transport 1/4 (2025_q4 inverts). Clean faithful build, no impl defect.
iterations.insight: CLEANEST DEMONSTRATION YET that univariate cross-sectional IC - even strong, orthogonal, AND universe-transport-stable - does NOT imply tradeable portfolio contribution on this book. Production pred (beta-neutral XS mean-reversion basket) already absorbs the productive reversal; overlaying raw -z(rel_ret_1d) re-ranks the same names from a noisier higher-turnover angle that trades AGAINST pred and destroys gross return (G4 p0 = signal-aligned re-rank worse than random, because it pulls against the order pred already got right). Same IC-transports-PnL-doesnt failure as iter-018. NEW STANDING PRE-CHECK (add alongside PRE-CHECK-G4 and check-GROSS-PnL): an alpha candidate must pass a CONDITIONAL/MARGINAL-CONTRIBUTION pre-check before build - does it add gross PnL GIVEN pred? Use (1) IC of the signal on pred-RESIDUALIZED forward returns (near-zero residual IC predicts PnL reject even at large raw IC; signal-orthogonality corr(rel,pred)=-0.022 is NOT the same as residual-orthogonality on outcomes - this signal looked orthogonal on signals yet redundant on outcomes), and/or (2) a tiny-weight (0.05-0.10) blend that must LIFT gross. Would have fail-fast-killed iter-022 before the 476s build. Construction/feature/cost/execution levers now exhausted on this book (iter-016/018/019/022 converge).
iterations.champion_after: UNCHANGED (= baseline, Calmar +1.68; + optional iter-012 vol-norm reactive stop)

iterations.hypothesis: Expanding the universe 70->156 (breadth=edge, iter-031) improves the honest transport-validated Sharpe/Calmar of the deploy strategy (regime-hybrid held-book + iter-012 vol-norm stop) vs the narrower 23-sym EXT baseline, robust to thin-history noise.
iterations.verdict: QUALIFIED ADOPT — deploy wider universe WITH a per-cycle min-history (~30d) gate; alpha champion UNCHANGED
iterations.universe: x132 expanded V0 (156 syms, 2021-26, 8 folds) vs x113 EXT-23

comparison_decomposition.note: ~all Sharpe lift over x113 EXT is the MODEL RETRAIN; adding 133 names is marginally negative on Sharpe but ~2x totPnL/capacity; OLD-47 beats FULL-156 -> 88 post-2024 thin names dilute.

iterations.thin_history_finding: winsorizing pred |3|/|1.5| changes NOTHING (rank book invariant to monotone clipping; wide [-34,+45] tails are a red herring, biggest tail-maker LITUSDT has full 2021 history); min-30d-history gate IMPROVES +1.03->+1.19/Cal +1.16->+1.33; OLD-only 47 syms beats full-156 -> breadth gain is the wider OLD set not the 88 thin post-2024 names.

gate_results.G1: PASS (PIT; X132 reuses X70 pipeline, target_z .shift(HORIZON), no clip-at-+-5 hack, defensive z-clip +-50 only; full-sample IC +0.0146 << +0.10 leak flag)
gate_results.G2: PASS (FULL-156 +stop Calmar +1.16 / Sharpe +1.03 > baseline EXT-23-x113 +0.74/+0.86; min-hist-180b +1.33/+1.19)
gate_results.G3: WAIVED (structural "trade widest set"; min-history floor tied to 180-bar warmup, not a fitted knob)
gate_results.G4: FAIL p69 (FULL-156 +1.03 ranks p69 of 100 random-100 draws; random-100 mean +0.92 p95 +1.26; breadth>truncation but the full set is not a special composition)
gate_results.G5: FAIL (6/8 folds; lift f5-concentrated, LOFO drop-f5 -> +0.65; f3 -1.38 & f4 -0.10 turn negative where narrower set is positive; EXT-23-x132 more robust 7/8 LOFO +0.87)
gate_results.G6: FAIL CROSSES ZERO (FULL-156 vs EXT-23-x132 per-cycle diff +0.79 bps, 95% block-bootstrap CI [-0.34, +2.28])
gate_results.G7: HOLDS (breadth-monotone shape reproduces on independent x132 panel; matches iter-031 HL70/EXT)

iterations.decisive_findings: Breadth=edge re-confirmed (monotone in N, transports, cost-robust) -> deploy WIDER. BUT (1) most Sharpe lift over x113-EXT is the model RETRAIN not the extra names; (2) full-156 not statistically better than a good narrower retrained set (G4 p69, G6 CI crosses 0) and is f5-concentrated (G5 6/8); (3) the 88 thin post-2024 names DILUTE (OLD-47 +1.15/Cal+1.37 > full-156; min-30d-history gate recovers +1.19/+1.33 = best honest config). Pred-winsorizing unnecessary (rank book tail-invariant).
iterations.insight: Universe-WIDTH lever now fully characterized across two independent builds (iter-031 HL70/EXT, iter-032 x132): breadth helps via dispersion but SATURATES/DILUTES once sub-30d-history names enter and does NOT buy cross-fold robustness (deep-DD/single-episode-concentration nature unchanged by width). Deploy rule: widest set ABOVE a per-cycle ~30d trailing-history floor + iter-031 hygiene + execution-liquidity floor. Wide V0 z-target tails harmless to rank book but must be winsorized in any |pred|-magnitude-weighted construction. Promising next thread: retrain-on-more-data (EXT-23 +0.86->+1.06) > universe width -> retrain-cadence study.
iterations.champion_after: ALPHA UNCHANGED (= baseline regime-hybrid held-book + iter-012 vol-norm stop). DEPLOY-UNIVERSE rule updated: widest set ABOVE a per-cycle ~30d min-history floor (history-gated wide set = best honest config, +1.19 Sharpe/+1.33 Calmar @4.5bps +stop).
